75236.subject: Strategy Authorizes $1.25B in Bitcoin Sales
75236.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy’s](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-authorizes-up-to-usd1-25b-of-bitcoin-sales-as-saylor-formalizes-capital-pivot)**[ never-sell era ends](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-authorizes-up-to-usd1-25b-of-bitcoin-sales-as-saylor-formalizes-capital-pivot)

* **[BNY](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/bny-usdc-institutional-custody-platform-circle-partnership)**[ makes USDC the first stablecoin on its custody platform](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/bny-usdc-institutional-custody-platform-circle-partnership)

* **[BlackRock](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/blackrock-adds-ethena-s-synthetic-dollar-to-its-usd20t-aladdin-risk-management-platform)**[ adds Ethena's USDe to its $20T risk platform](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/blackrock-adds-ethena-s-synthetic-dollar-to-its-usd20t-aladdin-risk-management-platform)

* [Cosmos Labs Acquires Mintscan and Team (Partner) ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cosmos-labs-acquires-mintscan-cosmos-korea-expansion)

* **[CFTC](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-expands-polymarket-probe-staged-trades-fake-wins)**[ expands its Polymarket probe ](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-expands-polymarket-probe-staged-trades-fake-wins)

* **[DraftKings](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/draftkings-launches-proprietary-prediction-markets-exchange-dkex)**[ launches a prediction-markets exchange](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/draftkings-launches-proprietary-prediction-markets-exchange-dkex)

* [Inside DTCC's Move to Stellar (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)

**Michael Saylor built Strategy on one promise: it would never sell bitcoin**. On Monday, the company authorized selling up to $1.25 billion of it.

The board [cleared Strategy to sell bitcoin](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-authorizes-up-to-usd1-25b-of-bitcoin-sales-as-saylor-formalizes-capital-pivot) to fund its **STRC** preferred dividend, now raised to **12%**, along with debt interest and stock buybacks. The authorization formalizes a pivot that began when the company [sold 32 bitcoin in May](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-sells-32-bitcoin-fund-preferred-dividends-first-sale-since-2022), its first sale since 2022. It follows Thursday's milestone, when Strategy's [enterprise mNAV fell below 1](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-enterprise-mnav-drops-below-1-first-time) for the first time, pushing the combined value of its debt, preferred, and equity above its **847,363-BTC** treasury and closing the equity-accretion channel that funded the buying spree.

Selling was the one outcome the whole structure was built to avoid. The preferred shares and convertible debt were sold on the premise that bitcoin would only be accumulated, with equity issued above net asset value to buy more. Funding dividends by selling the asset inverts that logic. The ope

75235.subject: Defender discontinuation effective June 30 (ACTION REQUIRED)
75235.body:
This is a reminder that Defender will be permanently retired on July 1, 2026, one day from now.

Dear Oleg,

This is a final reminder that the OpenZeppelin Defender platform will be permanently discontinued on June 30, 2026. After 23:59 UTC on that date, the Defender web application, its APIs, Relayers, Monitors and all associated hosted services will be shut down and permanently deleted. Please read this email carefully.

IF YOU DO NOT TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION, YOU WILL PERMANENTLY LOSE ACCESS TO ANY INTEGRATIONS THAT MAY BE ASSOCIATED WITH YOUR DEFENDER ACCOUNT, INCLUDING RELATED GAS TOKENS, SMART CONTRACTS, OR OTHER DATA OR CONFIGURATIONS.

As one day now remains, we ask that you complete the actions described below before the discontinuation date to avoid disruption or loss.

What is happening

As we informed you in our prior notices, OpenZeppelin is discontinuing the Defender Services on June 30, 2026. Discontinuation of the Services (as defined in our Terms of Service available at openzeppelin.com/tos (https://cXwgv04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/LY+113/cXwgv04/VWxC4w2DtP84W8n_6qp8PXt4GW6TYKFS5QW181N63y6n63lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3mKN2lQ3sC2JK5_W3w6q9D1mG6_rW8GbYjK8SBFHwW3zzTQM8PwQpJVd3NWG1DH9wLW71rtK46LClb1VQsXMQ1C0QVVW2fg8_18p3klNW3j9b0L1hVYknW7kP_JT5m4lDJW575bHG2xvDFdW7jHXtK1T9N9PN1spj0bhLBK9W3JLXXV4np6FHN46p5SXtM0HKW1G983M6C2Y44W2ZqxLD61WN0gW34k6fH5DFxmLW2wXw-Q80MGPbW1Kpn7y3TJs8SW7VFpzG1NwQLjVHC4Ny1bn0Ntf3lxPw604 ) ) will result in the permanent loss of your Service Inputs and Service Outputs, including, without limitation, Relayers, Monitors, Notifications, Actions/Autotasks, Sentinels, transaction proposals, address books, and any data, tokens, gas tokens, smart contracts, integrations and configurations stored in, or otherwise associated with, your Defender account.

You remain solely responsible for withdrawing any tokens in, and for managing access to, any smart contracts or blockchain accounts you have integrated with Defender, including gas tokens associated with a Relayer that was created by you using your Defender account. OpenZeppelin cannot manage, withdraw, or recover any such tokens, smart contracts, or other integrations on your behalf.

If you do not take action prior to June 30, 2026 access will be permanently lost.

Open source migration path

This migration guide (https://cXwgv04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/LY+113/cXwgv04/VWxC4w2DtP84W8n_6qp8PXt4GW6TYKFS5QW181N63y6nq3lcq-W7lCdLW6lZ3lJW7y59-h1cYs0-VvQBPR6_dw5WW8hGwr83kRsl-W2QRgPk9565vzW1qrwJw8zTP6gV79S9J6kLzNZW6s7TLC5xTvwwW2LFQTY5P9my3W6xNrdB8q13szW2cXQL45bwrdTW956Jwb8JZg5dW2fbM7J5BNgVPW96cwk72c1s-RW4WKB381XQQj3W4Pn6tt3WlLbgW7MbPWP8mx509W5c3bvw64ctGMN46vm5LMlSdNW8HV-VP2jHnHfW7SXqw32bl8qLW7Z_78Q5DyMykW1FFQDB8nywp_W2VMFJT5RXWmsW5KP3pm7bp92Mf44LDT004 ) covers everything you need to move to our open-source tools (Monitor and Relayer): one-click config export from the Defender UI, step-by-step video walkthroughs, SDK migration examples, and support for running both systems i

75233.subject: 🟪 The new currency of want
75233.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

“Consumption is the sole end and purpose of all production.”
_— __Adam Smith__ _



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b6a856a4-7311-4f70-8a0a-038ea903e108/image.png?t=1782769950)
Caption: 

# The new currency of want

The [Galaxy M9 SUV](https://www.edmunds.com/car-news/2026-geely-galaxy-m9-hybrid-chinese-suv-tested.html) is loaded with features standard in China but unheard of in the US.

The seats are leather, heated, ventilated, massaging, and fully reclinable. With the press of a button, all three rows (except the driver’s seat) fold flat to create cargo space.

A built-in refrigerator can be set to cold for drinks or to warm for food. Exterior speakers play songs or shout greetings at passersby. The 30-inch dashboard display has 6k resolution and “iPhone-like” responsiveness. 

There’s a built-in karaoke machine.

It’s highly capable, too. The plug-in hybrid has a driving range of 808 miles. It accelerates from 0 to 60 in 4.2 seconds — faster than a BMW X5. The cabin registers just 32.5 decibels of noise when at idle — quieter than a Rolls-Royce Spectre.

The cost of such luxury? $25,000.

A reviewer for Edmunds says the M9 is comparable to what you’d get for more than twice the price in the US. 

But I think that’s underselling how left-behind US car buyers are becoming. And overcharged.

The BYD Great Tang SUV, for example, goes 620 miles on a single battery charge. In the US, the  longest-ranged car is the Lucid Air Grand Touring, which manages just 512 miles. 

The Lucid Air starts at $138,000. The BYD costs $38,000.

The BYD also responds to voice commands. You can tell it to roll the windows down 25%, for example, or order a coffee at the next Starbucks for you. (And then to drive you there, of course.)

In a competitor's EV, you can even tell the car to turn itself into a bedroom (pictured above). 

“Transform your XPENG model's cabin into a comfortable, spacious sleeping area, allowing you to take a break and re-energize on long journeys,” their website [says](https://www.xpeng.com/).

XPENG models start at $17,000.

XPENG’s come with an option to put a drone on the roof. Tell the car to launch and watch the drone’s video feed on your display — to s

75232.subject: From Waltons To Rockefellers, These Are America’s Richest Families
75232.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/from-waltons-rockefellers-americas-richest-families-forbes-magazine-8e0lc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B17zPbgpSQJmiPb6AGUtr7w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0yxsdoP2yEosk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqzq2cg0~hy-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqzq2cg0-hy
  
Good evening, As America’s 250th anniversary approaches, Forbes is celebrating the entrepreneurs behind some of the most successful businesses—and the largest family fortunes—in the country. That includes everyone from the Hughes family (estimated fortune: $14.7 billion) behind Public Storage, who are now in their third generation, to the oldest clan on the list, the Du Ponts ($22 billion), who founded what became the chemical giant bearing their name in 1802, and are now in their ninth generation. The combined net worth of this year’s group is $1.9 trillion, nearly $600 billion more than the total two years ago. Here’s who made the 2026 list. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images Ellison’s Net Worth Plunges $100 Billion—Falling Below Zuckerberg As World’s Seventh Richest The switch-up follows another rise in Meta’s stock and a nearly monthlong downturn in Oracle shares. Associated Press A Testy Musk Attacks Claims DOGE’s Cuts Killed Children. But Studies Paint Grim Picture. Refugees International cited USAID’s closure as the “most prominent manifestation” of a downturn in international humanitarian aid.
Приєднатися до обговорення

75231.subject: Webinar: Your Retirement Account Can Do More Than You Think
75231.body:
A step-by-step guide to investing with your IRA or 401(k) funds

IRA Webinar (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VXcc4D8BT2yxV-JGFD5hWMbkVhPn1w5QVCGlN70SksF3lcq-W69sMD-6lZ3lDW6SM-rF75wZ9MW5cgx7K20S9CkW4VfbjN6zrNwWN8jbgFNThqYLW1M3nZG82MvfjVft5C31M1dJBV21FSw29rGt_W6lSmNM5ry38nW1DWN4W4WWyWJW5WBSMJ2Rsls_W5RwfkD8LLbwvW5VHdj_5xLjsvN71cBfLYd71LW7B9MNC1Mqrk4W4ScfMH7DSHpXW7WVnvt6MtT4qV7hs4b1jtXJhW2fh4fq1K3XFbW2LBKtg8w0wmqW4z9GX63BkFcCdRkBjR04 )

Hi Oleg,

One of the most common questions I hear from investors:

“Can I use my retirement savings to invest in pre-IPO opportunities?”

The answer is “Yes,” and I’m hosting a webinar next week to walk you through how it works.

Join me on Thursday, July 2, at 2:00 PM ET / 11:00 AM PT for a step-by-step guide on investing with a self-directed IRA. We’ll cover:

- Pre-IPO in 2026: Why 86% of wealth managers are increasing their private allocation.¹
- The 50/30/20 Portfolio: Why BlackRock’s Larry Fink is advocating for a new standard.²
- Potential Tax Advantages: How gains can be tax-deferred or potentially tax-free.³
- Setting Up Your Account: From rolling over funds to browsing opportunities.

More than 800 investors have opened StartEngine IRA accounts, putting over $17 million to work in pre-IPO opportunities for companies like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Stripe.⁴

Whether you’re ready to join them or just exploring your options, this session will give you a clear roadmap for putting your retirement dollars to work.

Register Here
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VXcc4D8BT2yxV-JGFD5hWMbkVhPn1w5QVCGlN70SksF3lcq-W69sMD-6lZ3lDW6SM-rF75wZ9MW5cgx7K20S9CkW4VfbjN6zrNwWN8jbgFNThqYLW1M3nZG82MvfjVft5C31M1dJBV21FSw29rGt_W6lSmNM5ry38nW1DWN4W4WWyWJW5WBSMJ2Rsls_W5RwfkD8LLbwvW5VHdj_5xLjsvN71cBfLYd71LW7B9MNC1Mqrk4W4ScfMH7DSHpXW7WVnvt6MtT4qV7hs4b1jtXJhW2fh4fq1K3XFbW2LBKtg8w0wmqW4z9GX63BkFcCdRkBjR04 )

Equity Trust Company is the custodian of StartEngine IRAs. StartEngine Crowdfunding, Inc. covers IRA account fees if you invest $20,000 or more per year; otherwise, you are responsible for all applicable fees annually. See IRA Fees (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VXcc4D8BT2yxV-JGFD5hWMbkVhPn1w5QVCGlN70Skv63lcq-W95jsWP6lZ3pRVj-xz76m7cgwVDltvM1M7435W6lvZQX7wP08kW7QYyfb3v114HW3Zpd8S1QqknTW7Bmw_Y6M0BFqW880Bn18kt971W9g-tDD1x72ZCW81N7074_LQX0W8DQWkV2jB4zYV4JYWK1Br0h2W2kRmYj6lWMwkW8qsbFJ3_KMmQW7-JXN16bLZ_tW5JqFcX6L5hvfW95xdrY24R3gCW73wJb05HXG51W7YZV103LGhRmW6CClgn5WbwCbW3_0L3V8pYBFHW1Yxssz4gg-LrW3SHCWh41SrBHW92zvjk5Vsld3W5FVfG74P942ZW3gsfqK5sdqYtW8S8BsW6sKL0CW8CNjM728pJw5W3lV5qx9k6GqJW1gpl4j6zJRJnW3FZMcg2r353Zf72mw4n04 ) and footnote 1 for more details.

Best,

James Munro

Senior Private Equity Associate

StartEngine

75230.subject: 🔷 The Daily: CZ can't make sense of Saylor's STRC
75230.body:
Strategy pauses bitcoin buys, establishes $1B digital credit repurchase program as USD reserve tops $2.5B | India's USDT premium tops 8.5% as crypto remittance crackdown squeezes stablecoin supply | BlackRock's Aladdin platform adds deeper support for Ethena's stablecoin products | Ethereum zkRollup project Loopring sunsets DEX, citing lack of meaningful adoption |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! *Bitcoin* is hovering around $60,000 as analysts warn ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406516/bitcoin-clings-to-key-support-level-as-weekly-us-spot-etf-outflows-hit-1-8b-and-fed-rate-hike-bets-mount-analysts?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) that heavy ETF outflows, rising demand for downside protection, and renewed *Fed* -hike bets are keeping pressure on crypto markets.

In today's newsletter, *Binance* founder *Changpeng "CZ" Zhao* says its *MiCA* application was "fully compliant," *Strategy* pauses its *bitcoin* buys and establishes a $1 billion digital credit repurchase program, *India's USDT* premium tops 8.5% amid a crypto remittance crackdown, and more.

Meanwhile, *Galaxy Research* cut ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406497/galaxy-cuts-clarity-act-passage-odds-50?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) its odds for *Clarity Act* passage in 2026 to 50%, citing *Senate* calendar concerns.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🇪🇺 Binance founder CZ says MiCA application was 'fully compliant' and near approval before political forces intervened*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/406554/binance-founder-cz-mica-application-fully-compliant-near-approval-political-forces-intervened?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Speaking on the inaugural episode of *The Block's* new daily show, The Starting Block , *Binance* founder *Changpeng "CZ" Zhao* said his understanding is that the crypto exchange's *MiCA* application was fully compliant and near approval from at least one EU regulator before political forces intervened, prompting last week's withdrawal.

* CZ said two EU countries wanted Binance in a "bidding war" over the license, but there were "other forces ... politics, et cetera" that opposed it, declining to
